records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And so, the Yaksha Division has obtained a contaminated Eternium from an Elysium Shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...And so, the Yaksha Division has obtained a contaminated Eternium from an Elysium Shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...And so, the Yaksha Division has obtained a contaminated Eternium from an Elysium Shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption ray emitting from this Eternium has been reverse-engineered to create a technology that traces back its coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption ray emitting from this Eternium has been reverse-engineered to create a technology that traces back its coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption ray emitting from this Eternium has been reverse-engineered to create a technology that traces back its coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this technology, we will be able to attack Philharmonic Hall Counterside in the variable depths.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this technology, we will be able to attack Philharmonic Hall Counterside in the variable depths.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this technology, we will be able to attack Philharmonic Hall Counterside in the variable depths.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, the Yaksha Division asks the Headquarters for Hive Control's tactic prediction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, the Yaksha Division asks the Headquarters for Hive Control's tactic prediction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, the Yaksha Division asks the Headquarters for Hive Control's tactic prediction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Furthermore, we ask to form a coalition of divisions for Operation <color=#ffd34c>Curtain Call</color> to descend to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Furthermore, we ask to form a coalition of divisions for Operation <color=#ffd34c>Curtain Call</color> to descend to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Furthermore, we ask to form a coalition of divisions for Operation <color=#ffd34c>Curtain Call</color> to descend to Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Attempting a dive will be too risky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Attempting a dive will be too risky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Attempting a dive will be too risky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Swift?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Swift?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Swift?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we will also send in our troops.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we will also send in our troops.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we will also send in our troops.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Sir Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Sir Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Sir Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are talking about Maestra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are talking about Maestra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are talking about Maestra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Outta my way, Justine...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Outta my way, Justine...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Outta my way, Justine...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Alice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Alice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Alice?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What's wrong with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What's wrong with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What's wrong with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, Judy Swift!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, Judy Swift!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, Judy Swift!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get some rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get some rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get some rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...We'll talk about this later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...We'll talk about this later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...We'll talk about this later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn, was I out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn, was I out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn, was I out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you cool off, Alice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you cool off, Alice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you cool off, Alice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Judy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Judy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Judy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. Just answer my question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. Just answer my question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. Just answer my question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why didn't you tell me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why didn't you tell me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why didn't you tell me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you didn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you didn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you didn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! I said, shut up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! I said, shut up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! I said, shut up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want your pity...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want your pity...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want your pity...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My husband...! He died because of you...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My husband...! He died because of you...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My husband...! He died because of you...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Aha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Aha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Aha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So she was right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So she was right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So she was right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...

records.m_Talk_ENG: everyone... died...
records.m_Talk_DEU: everyone... died...
records.m_Talk_FRA: everyone... died...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Judy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! Judy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Judy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you. You didn't kill them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you. You didn't kill them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you. You didn't kill them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We... did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We... did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We... did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We made a <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We made a <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The best outcome?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Furthermore, we ask to form a coalition of divisions for Operation <color=#ffd34c>Curtain Call</color> to descend to Philharmonic Hall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze Commander Lyudmila, requesting to speak.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander, the variable depths are unknown territory where the coordinates of the world randomly change.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Attempting a dive will be too risky.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Attempting a dive will be too risky.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Attempting a dive will be too risky.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One mistake could cost your comrades' lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is exactly why those Shadows have relocated their base to the variable depths, Maze Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those arrogant Shadows are there, knowing that the Administration can't easily attack them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the Administration's technological progress advances every moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And we, Yaksha, have always been the first to step on uncharted territory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander, you said that the coordinates in the variable depths change randomly, correct?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our technology tracks the Corruption rays of Elysium Shadows and inverts them into their coordinates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a result, we discovered that the coordinates of the variable depths are not random, but change at regular intervals.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the case of this operation's objective, Philharmonic Hall, the coordinates change every seven minutes and forty-three seconds in Normalside time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The renewed coordinates can also be quickly found by retracing the Corruption ray.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assure you this in the name of Yaksha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know about any other place, but I promise to guide you all to Philharmonic Hall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must remind you that this is our golden opportunity to destroy the Elysium Shadows who have massacred countless comrades.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope that all Commanders and deputy Commanders here today do not forget about that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's some interesting technology you got there. Guess the kid who transferred over from the Weapon Development Bureau put it quite the effort.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. 12th Adjudication Division Arkon will send its Arbiters to the Yaksha Division.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Considering the damage Elysium Shadows have cost the Administration...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I believe it is time we brought judgment to their sinful souls.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Swift?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Swift?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Swift?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your cooperation, Arkon Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure Commander Lionel would be pleased with this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: 13th Guardian Division Camelot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Considering the nature of our division, an assault doesn't really suite us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we have a debt to Commander Lionel we'll have to eventually repay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we will also send in our troops.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we will also send in our troops.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we will also send in our troops.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Sir Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Sir Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Sir Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.
root.m_Talk_DEU: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.
root.m_Talk_FRA: 8th Seal Division Gordias, Deputy Commander Hayami Sanae.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gordias is also in a similar situation with Camelot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Due to our work with managing the Seal Domains, we have some difficulties sending reinforcements.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wish you good luck, Yaksha Deputy CommanderDeputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know of your complicated situation, Hayami.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope your family affairs will get resolved soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've read the detailed operation report, Yaksha Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a large-scale operation, but I'm not convinced we'll be able to cause devastating damage to our enemies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Fenrir Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this report lacks any measure in dealing with the <color=#ffd34c>Demogorgon</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You are talking about Maestra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You are talking about Maestra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You are talking about Maestra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each division should prioritize its assigned roles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the coalition divisions, the spearhead of this operation will have to be Yaksha, the one who proposed it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll ask you straight to not waste any more time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What plan does Yaksha have to deal with Maestra in the absence of Lionel?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you! You can't be in there...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander is in a meeting right now...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Outta my way, Justine...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Outta my way, Justine...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Outta my way, Justine...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Alice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Alice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Alice?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm sorry, but I'm in the middle of the meeting with other divisions. So if it's not important
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What's wrong with you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What's wrong with you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What's wrong with you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, could you first calm down and let go of me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't you see all the other divisions are watching us right now? You're being rude.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up, Judy Swift!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up, Judy Swift!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up, Judy Swift!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you hide it from me?! Why didn't you tell me about the <color=#ffd34c>Awakening Collapse</color>?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I didn't want to do this but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get some rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get some rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get some rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...We'll talk about this later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...We'll talk about this later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...We'll talk about this later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Damn, was I out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn, was I out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn, was I out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you cool off, Alice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you cool off, Alice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you cool off, Alice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Judy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Judy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Judy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't have interrupted the meeting with other divisions like that even if it was urgent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone was making a fuss about it. You do know what you did was mutiny, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut it. Just answer my question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut it. Just answer my question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut it. Just answer my question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why didn't you tell me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why didn't you tell me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why didn't you tell me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That when a Counter awakens, a Counterside Effect could occur with flames and explosions...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain and my colleagues... and even that kid he tried to save...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why didn't you tell me... that I was the one who killed them all...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because you didn't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because you didn't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because you didn't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up! I said, shut up!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up! I said, shut up!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up! I said, shut up!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want your pity...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want your pity...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want your pity...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That explosion happened because I became a Counter...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I touched that Watch and an Awakening Collapse occurred...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My husband...! He died because of you...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: My husband...! He died because of you...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: My husband...! He died because of you...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because you had to go in that building to try and save that girl, he got crushed by the building and burned to death...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's because of you...! Because you were at the scene, my husband...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Aha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Aha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Aha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH! AH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH HAH!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So she was right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So she was right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So she was right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's... because I was there... It's because I was at the scene...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because someone like me... became a firefighter...

root.m_Talk_ENG: everyone... died...
root.m_Talk_DEU: everyone... died...
root.m_Talk_FRA: everyone... died...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain... the kid he was trying to save...! EVERYONE...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Save the rescuee and myself...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's nonsense... Absolute nonsense...!! You bastard!! I COULDN'T SAVE ANYONE!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It'd be better...! If it were me that died that day...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Judy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! Judy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Judy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you. You didn't kill them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you. You didn't kill them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you. You didn't kill them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We... did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We... did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We... did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We made a <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We made a <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We made a <color=#ffd34c>choice</color>.
